```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(terra)
library(sf)
source(here("general_functions.R"))
source(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "functions_genetic_diversity.R"))
plotpath <- here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "plots")
outpath <- here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs")

# Read in heterozygosity files
nonsyn_het <- 
  get_het("allnonsyn.het") %>%
  mutate(Ho_nonsyn = 1 - `O(HOM)`/`N(NM)`) %>%
  select(SampleID, Ho_nonsyn)
syn_het <-
  get_het("allsyn.het") %>%
  mutate(Ho_syn = 1 - `O(HOM)`/`N(NM)`) %>%
  select(SampleID, Ho_syn)
geanonsyn_het <-
  get_het("nonsyn.het") %>%
  mutate(Ho_geanonsyn = 1 - `O(HOM)`/`N(NM)`) %>%
  select(SampleID, Ho_geanonsyn)

het_df <- 
  get_het("58-Sceloporus_chr.het") 

het_df <- left_join(het_df, nonsyn_het) %>% left_join(geanonsyn_het) %>% left_join(syn_het) %>% 
# Scale
  mutate(
    Ho_scaled = as.numeric(scale(Ho)),
    Ho_nonsyn_scaled = as.numeric(scale(Ho_nonsyn)),
    Ho_geanonsyn_scaled = as.numeric(scale(Ho_geanonsyn)),
    Ho_syn_scaled = as.numeric(scale(Ho_syn)))
```


```{r}
wingen_r <- 
  terra::rast(here(outpath, "Ho_nonsyn_kriged_masked.tif")) %>% 
  mask(get_range()) %>%
  as.data.frame(xy = TRUE, na.rm = TRUE) 
names(wingen_r)[3] <- "layer"  # ensure 'layer' is the raster value column

ca_proj <- get_ca() %>% st_transform(3310)

scale_met_cont <- function(values, aesthetic = c("fill", "colour"), extend_scale = 0.1) {
  aesthetic <- match.arg(aesthetic)
  r_min <- min(values, na.rm = TRUE)
  r_max <- max(values, na.rm = TRUE)
  rng   <- r_max - r_min
  lims  <- c(r_min - rng*extend_scale, r_max + rng*extend_scale)

  pal <- rev(MetBrewer::met.brewer("Hiroshige", type = "continuous"))
  if (aesthetic == "fill") {
    ggplot2::scale_fill_gradientn(colors = pal, limits = lims, oob = scales::squish)
  } else {
    ggplot2::scale_colour_gradientn(colors = pal, limits = lims, oob = scales::squish)
  }
}
```

```{r}
future <- rast(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "scelop_adaptive_env_layers","env_fut_2071-2100_GFDL-ESM4_ssp126_ssp585.tif"))[[2]]
names(future)
current <- rast(here("data", "env", "california_chelsa_bioclim_1981-2010_V.2.1.tif"))[["CHELSA_bio1_1981-2010_V.2.1"]]
coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE)
df <- left_join(coords, het_df, by = "SampleID")
df$future_bio1 <- extract(future, df, ID = FALSE, method = "bilinear")[,1]
df$current_bio1 <- extract(current, df, ID = FALSE, method = "bilinear")[,1]
df$future_change <- df$future_bio1 - df$current_bio1
```

```{r}
library(ggpubr)
# A: wingen map of heterozygosity 
pltA <- 
  ggplot(wingen_r) +
  geom_sf(data = ca_proj, fill = "gray90", colour = NA, size = 2) +
  geom_tile(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = layer), colour = NA) +
  scale_met_cont(c(df$Ho_nonsyn, wingen_r$layer), aesthetic = "fill", extend_scale = 0.1) +
  labs(fill = "Non-synonymous\nheterozygosity") +
  theme_void() +
  geom_sf(data = df, shape = 21, aes(fill = Ho_nonsyn), colour = "#00000087", size = 2) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "inside",
    legend.key.height = unit(0.7, "cm"),
    legend.key.width  = unit(0.7, "cm"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.position.inside = c(0.8, 0.8),
    plot.margin = margin(5,5,5,25)
  )


# N: Plot of non-syn vs genome-wide Ho
pltB <- 
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Ho, y = Ho_nonsyn)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, aes(col = Ho_nonsyn)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "black") +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", size = 6) +
  scale_met_cont(c(df$Ho_nonsyn, wingen_r$layer), aesthetic = "col", extend_scale = 0.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Genome-wide heterozygosity",
    y = "Non-synonymous heterozygosity"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.margin = margin(5,15,5,15)
  )

# Plot of future-change vs non-syn Ho
pltC <- 
  ggplot(df, aes(x = future_change, y = Ho_nonsyn, color = Ho_nonsyn)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "black") +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", size = 6) +
  labs(x = "Future climate change",
       y = "Non-synonymous heterozygosity") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.margin = margin(5,15,5,15)
  ) +
  scale_met_cont(c(df$Ho_nonsyn, wingen_r$layer), aesthetic = "col", extend_scale = 0.1) 


group1 <- cowplot::plot_grid(pltB, pltC, nrow = 1, labels = c("B", "C"), label_size = 18, align = "hv")
png(here(plotpath, "nonsyn_vs_het_vs_climate_change.png"), width = 15, height = 5, units = "in", res = 300)
cowplot::plot_grid(pltA, group1, nrow = 1, labels = c("A", ""), label_size = 18, rel_widths = c(0.3,0.7))
dev.off()
```
